executives.name: John L. Hopkins
executives.background: Mr. Hopkins has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since May 2022. He previously served as the President and Chief Executive Officer of NuScale LLC from December 2012 to May 2022. Prior to joining NuScale LLC, Mr. Hopkins held several senior executive positions at Fluor Corporation, including Group President of Fluor’s Government Group and President of Fluor’s Global Corporate Development and New Ventures Group.

executives.name: Robert Hamady
executives.background: Mr. Hamady has served as our Chief Financial Officer since April 2023. Prior to joining NuScale, Mr. Hamady served as the Chief Financial Officer of various private and public companies and held senior roles in investment banking and finance.

executives.name: Carl J. (Chuck) Goodnight
executives.background: Mr. Goodnight has served as our Chief Operating Officer since January 2024. He previously served as Vice President of Sales and Business Development for NuScale LLC.

board_of_directors.name: John L. Hopkins
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hopkins has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since May 2022. He previously served as the President and Chief Executive Officer of NuScale LLC from December 2012 to May 2022.

board_of_directors.name: Alan L. Boeckmann
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Boeckmann has served as a member of our Board since May 2022. He is the former Executive Chairman and CEO of Fluor Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Alvin C. Collins III
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Collins has served as a member of our Board since May 2022. He is a retired executive from Fluor Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: James T. Hackett
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hackett has served as a member of our Board since May 2022. He is the former Executive Chairman of Anadarko Petroleum Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Kent Kresa
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kresa has served as a member of our Board since May 2022. He is the Chairman Emeritus of Northrop Grumman Corporation.

sources.source_description: NuScale Power Corporation DEF 14A Proxy Statement
